title: Office supplies for jury commission
doc_html:
§3104.  Office supplies for jury commission

The city of New Orleans may pay the jury commissioners for the parish of Orleans, the sum of one hundred dollars per month semi-monthly, to be used by them for the purchase of stationery, stamps and other necessary office supplies.
doc_text:
§3104.  Office supplies for jury commission
The city of New Orleans may pay the jury commissioners for the parish of Orleans, the sum of one hundred dollars per month semi-monthly, to be used by them for the purchase of stationery, stamps and other necessary office supplies.
